admission_requirements: Secondary school certificate (studentereksamen) or Højere-Forberedelseseksamen (HF), Højere, Handelseksamen, (HHX) or Højere Teknisk eksamen (HTX), or recognized equivalent

annual_tuition_cost: Scholarships and Tuition Fees Aalto University offers a limited number of scholarships in the form of tuition fee waivers to fee-paying students. The scholarships are highly competitive and granted to the top applicants. Tuition fees In Finland, tuition fees are collected from students who are citizens of countries other than those of the European Union (EU), the European Economic Area (EEA) or Switzerland. Tuition fees apply to degree programmes taught in English. Who needs to pay tuition fees? - Most non-EU/EEA citizens have to pay tuition fees for a bachelor’s or master’s degree programme taught in English.

admission_requirements: Graduation from high school or equivalent, and College Board SAT or ACT examination. TOEFL test for foreign students

admission_requirements: Dual Enrollment Visit Us Visiting a campus plays such an important role in choosing the right school and we want the chance to show you what ABAC is all about. After spending some time on campus and seeing all our school has to offer, you’ll see why we love it here. Requirements Age/Grade Level: Successful Completion of 10th grade. On track for completing the 17 units of the USG’s Required High School Curriculum (RHSC). Additional information on RHSC in the USG's Staying on Course document. At least 3.0 High School Grade Point Average calculated on RHSC courses completed.

university_name: Aarhus School of Marine and Technical Engineering
admission_requirements: How to apply First of all, you need to contact the International Office at your university about going on an exchange programme. This is to make sure that your home institution has a bilateral exchange agreement with Aarhus School of Marine and Technical Engineering (AAMS). If your university has an exchange agreement with us, your international office must nominate you by sending an e-mail to our International Coordinator Jannie Sloth Hesselbjerg at jsh@aams.dk.

At Acacia, we are committed to making high-quality education affordable. We believe everyone should have access to quality education at a reasonable price. Being an exclusively online school allows us to optimize our operations efficiently, offering our students the best value. Starting the adult learning journey can be challenging, but with Acacia’s support, these obstacles become manageable. We proudly offer quality educational services, affordable learning solutions tailored to help our students achieve their academic and professional goals. | Programs | Total Tuition | No.
